cve.title: CVE-2026-4392 - TeamSpeak 3 Server clientek Handshake assertion
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability was detected in TeamSpeak 3 Server up to 3.13.7. This issue affects some unknown processing of the component clientek Handshake Handler. Performing a manipulation of the argument proof results in reachable assertion. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible.

cve.contentSnippet: A security vulnerability has been detected in TeamSpeak 3 Server up to 3.13.7. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the component ECC Key Parser. cve.title: CVE-2026-4390 - TeamSpeak 3 Server Connection State Management process_resend_queue use after free
cve.contentSnippet: A weakness has been identified in TeamSpeak 3 Server up to 3.13.7. This affects the function process_resend_queue of the component Connection State Management.
